linkedin_drafts.headline: DevOps / Agentic OS Builder | Open-source automation, Hermes Agent, Next.js, Telegram hardening | Based in Abidjan, CI
linkedin_drafts.about:
DevOps-focused builder shipping production-grade automation without .env, without plaintext secrets, without fluff.

I design end-to-end digital workflows for African SMEs: quotes, alerts, video analysis, and cron-driven growth. My current stack is 100% open-source: Hermes Agent, Ollama, Next.js 14, systemd hardening, and evidence-gated automation with 8-second OODA loops.

I care more about shipped artifacts than CV padding. If you need remote automation, API-first integrations, or hardened local services, let’s talk.
linkedin_drafts.post_remote_search:
Je cherche des missions en remote.
